what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that declares a board_items attachment (att-4781d029) linked to a specific board item (item-708c0d0e) in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-708c0d0e
standouts: board:// URI scheme for cross-entity linking
attachment acts as a typed pointer from a channel memory attachment to a board item
concerns: No body content or context beyond the pointer; purpose of the link is not explained in this file
notes: A thin typed pointer file that records when a channel attachment was linked to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does att-4781d029 represent?
What is the nature of board://item-708c0d0e?
Is the attachment_type board_items meant to imply the attachment contains board items or is attached to one?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose (as inferred from fields) matches what it does: it records an attachment-to-board-item link.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to maintain a persistent, discoverable record of which channel attachments correspond to which board items, enabling cross-referencing between channel memory and board items.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item from a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a minimal, machine-readable attachment-to-board-item reference that a fused system could use to correlate channel memory entries with board items.
summary_for_embedding: A channel memory attachment metadata file linking att-4781d029 to board item item-708c0d0e in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment is associated with a specific board item for cross-reference and retrieval.
